content.en:
"The Stargazing Sword Ancestor is finally going to choose to break through!"

When Ye Tian first met the Stargazing Sword Ancestor, the other party's will and body fusion level was already close to one percent, but now that he was afraid that he had reached one percent, he would no longer be stuck in the Nine Extremes Realm, and he would impact the Eternal Realm.

Only when the Stargazing Sword Ancestor has impacted the Eternal Realm can his strength reach the level of the Immortal Realm, and if he becomes the Immortal Realm, he will be eligible to obtain more resources.

Although at the Nine Extremes Realm level, it is easier to fuse the will and body, but if there is no other opportunity, the speed will be very slow.

Moreover, the creatures of the space-time territory, even if they are in the Nine Extremes Realm, still have a lifespan, so it is impossible for the Stargazing Sword Ancestor to stay in the Nine Extremes Realm all the time.

The location chosen by the Stargazing Sword Ancestor to break through was in the Eight Poles Tower, and he invited many friends to come and observe, including many lords of the Immortal Realm.

Eight pole building.

A member of the Eternal Realm and the Eight Poles Tower all came here, waiting for the breakthrough of the Stargazing Sword Ancestor.

Not long after, a huge vortex of origin energy was generated around the Eight Pole Tower, and endless innate eternal rules poured into the body of the Stargazing Sword Ancestor, fusing with his body, and the fusion of innate eternal rules with his body was a necessary condition to become an eternal realm.

The Nine Extremes Realm is very easy to fuse the body with the innate eternal rules, so it won't take long for the Stargazing Sword Ancestor to break through to become an eternal realm, and it is an immortal realm, and it will cross the two realms of the immortal realm and the immortal realm at once.

Buzz Buzz !!!

A giant sword that covered the entire space-time territory appeared, enveloping the space-time territory and the surrounding void area.

And the projection of a majestic body turned into a shocking giant, as if one hand could cover a space-time territory.

This majestic figure is the Stargazing Sword Ancestor, and all of this is just the escape of the breakthrough power of the Stargazing Sword Ancestor.

In the space-time territory, many living beings dare not look directly at the projection of the Stargazing Sword Ancestor's body, if someone dares to look directly, the body and soul will be frozen, and time and space will be frozen, and only the Eight Extremes Realm will dare to look directly at the breakthrough process of the Stargazing Sword Ancestor.

After a long time, the breakthrough of the Stargazing Sword Ancestor was officially completed.

Then.

The voice of the Stargazing Sword Ancestor was transmitted.

"Everyone, please come in!"

Soon, everyone saw the Stargazing Sword Ancestor.

At this time, the aura of the Stargazing Sword Ancestor could not be fully converging, so the aura of the Immortal Realm escaped a little, which produced a major suppression on many Eight Extremes Realms, and even Ye Tian felt a faint suppression.

"Immortal Realm Lord!"

Many of the Eight Extremes Realm looked at the Stargazing Sword Ancestor and were very envious.

In the entire space-time territory, there are too few Immortal Realm lords, and the Stargazing Sword Ancestor has now stepped into this level, standing at the top of the space-time territory.

"I've seen the Stargazing Lord!"

The eight poles said respectfully.

In any case, the Stargazing Sword Ancestor was no longer a half-step Eternal Realm, but an Eternal Realm Lord.

.“ Today, I preach immortality, so I will preach here, and from now on, I will no longer be a member of the Eight Poles. "

Lord Dao. The other Eight Extremes Realm Moji Building is originally a joint force of the Eight Extremes Realm or the Nine Extremes Realm, once it breaks through to the Eternal Realm, it must leave the Eight Extremes Building, this is the rule.

So, they didn't dissuade the stargazing lords.

Subsequently.

The Stargazing Lord told about his own sermon, and even told a lot of experiences like the experience of impacting the Eternal Realm and how to impact the Nine Extremes Realm, and this sermon took 100,000 years to finally end.

After that, the Stargazing Lord chatted with Ye Tian in private.

"Endless Ancestor, I'm afraid you have already surpassed one percent in terms of the degree of fusion of your will and body, when are you going to impact the Eternal Realm?"

The Stargazing Lord asked curiously.

"Wait a minute, I am a source sea being, and there is no limit to my lifespan, so I am not in a hurry!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"That's right!" the Stargazing Lord nodded slightly, but still reminded: "However, there is no need for you to stay in the Nine Extremes Realm for too long, only after becoming an Immortal Realm, you can get more opportunities if you become stronger and stronger, and the Nine Extremes Realm is actually not strong in the space-time territory, and it is difficult to obtain many benefits." "

"I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

......

"The Stargazing Sword Ancestor has broken through to the Eternal Realm, and in this era of the space-time territory, I am the only one in the Nine Extremes Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this time.

His strength has approached a limit, he has gained a lot of benefits in the ruins of the Silent Void Battlefield, and he has also obtained many inheritances, and even obtained a secret technique that can improve his will, similar to the Will World, and even stronger than the Will World, which makes it easier for Ye Tian to perfect the secret art of the Will World.

In addition, Ye Tian also found some treasures that could enhance the refining of will, and now he had opened up a world of fifty thousand wills, and the will and the innate eternal rules were fused more.

And the integration of the will and the body has finally reached the realm of three percent.

Not only that, Ye Tian also created a legendary-level Will Eternal Technique, which greatly increased his strength.

Moreover, Ye Tian's half-step eternal power was almost compressed to the current extreme, to a level of nearly 300.

After some more years, Ye Tian's strength improvement became slower and slower, and he almost stagnated.

Moreover, it had become difficult for him to hunt the Void Beast now.

In the end, Ye Tian decided to break through to the Eternal Realm first, and then he could copy the body of the Void Beast, and it would be easier to hunt the Void Beast, even if after breaking through to the Immortal Realm, it would be more difficult to improve the degree of fusion between the will and the body, but at least with a large amount of Void Beast materials, the cultivation speed would definitely be faster than now.

Therefore, he no longer hesitated, and the main body directly broke through in the source sea without notifying anyone.

Dark Forbidden Realm.

Ye Tian chose to break through here, once he completed his breakthrough, the Dark Forbidden Domain would probably transform again, surpassing the Eternal Heaven and Earth level.

During the breakthrough process, Ye Tian continued to publicize it, so that the human race could not look directly at his breakthrough process.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to make a formal breakthrough.

Rumble!!!!!

Under Ye Tian's control, the endless innate eternal rules began to merge with the body.307

Gradually, every particle in his body completely fused with the Innate Eternal Rule and turned into an Innate Eternal Particle.

At the same time, endless origin energy poured into Ye Tian's body, helping him complete the final qualitative change.

And Ye Tian's aura became more and more terrifying, spreading to the entire Dark Forbidden Domain and even the surrounding endless territories.

At this moment, Ye Tian seemed to have turned into a giant, one foot was enough to step on a large number of eternal heaven and earth, and even the endless creatures of the entire Source Sea seemed to sense a terrifying existence, unable to look directly or seen, but he sensed it in the dark.

After a long time.

Ye Tian's body has completed the final transformation, and his body has been completely integrated with the Innate Eternal Rules, and his future casual blows will be the most perfect use of the Innate Eternal Rules, and any blow will be an attack like the Innate Eternal Rules.

Not only that, but because the will and body have fused, and the degree of fusion has reached more than 30%, the will has skyrocketed, and the strength of the body has also skyrocketed.

Now, Ye Tian has not only stepped into the Immortal Realm level, but also belongs to a relatively powerful category at the Immortal Realm level.

According to the fusion of will and body, the one-step fusion is the newly promoted immortal realm, which is called the one-step immortal realm, and the ninety percent fusion is the nine-step immortal realm, and Ye Tian can be regarded as stepping out of the third step, which is the three-step immortal realm.

However, if combined with the Legendary Will Eternal Technique and a large number of other Legendary Eternal Techniques, his strength was even much stronger than many Immortal Realms of four or five steps or even six or seven steps. _
